id: set-vrm-look-target
title: "Set VRM look-at target"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set VRM look-at target"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/look/target/{target}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Configure the VRM model to look at a specific entity target.
